items.title: Multi-role pre-review
items.reason: Complex feature work needs product, architecture, backend, frontend, and QA review before implementation.
items.guard: Complex add/update implementation must not proceed unless decision.md explicitly contains Allow Implementation; npm run check invokes context-aware check:review with --require-allow.
items.evidence: docs/multi-role-review-workflow.md, scripts/review-feature.js, tools/review-checker.js, package.json check:review --require-allow, tests/governance-sales-order-handoff-gate.test.js context-aware review gate cases
items.futureAction: Run review:feature for the sales-order proposal and record the decision before implementation.

items.title: Current context pack
items.reason: New Codex windows need a compact, deterministic handoff instead of reading all history.
items.guard: context:build must generate current-context markdown/json with bounded must-read files.
items.futureAction: Run npm run context:build -- customer before sales-order planning.

items.title: Context pack structure check
items.reason: The generated current context must stay bounded, structured, and reasoned.
items.guard: check:context-pack validates current-context files, feature context size, and must-read reasons.
items.futureAction: Keep current-context deterministic and below the line/read-budget thresholds.

items.title: Document size gate
items.reason: AGENTS, README, project state, handover, context, and review summaries must not grow without control.
items.guard: check:doc-size reads real files and reports line-count failures.
items.futureAction: Split or summarize oversized governance docs instead of appending indefinitely.

items.title: Read budget gate
items.reason: New sessions should read the smallest useful context set.
items.guard: check:read-budget validates mustReadFiles count and reasons.
items.futureAction: Add extra must-read files only with a written reason.

items.title: File weight gate
items.reason: Large Vue, Java service, and mapper files need split plans or exceptions when touched.
items.guard: check:file-weight reads current changed files and enforces split-plan or weight-exception notes for oversized touched files.
items.futureAction: Before touching heavy files, add a split plan or weight exception to the change record.

items.title: Roadmap structure gate
items.reason: The enhancement backlog must stay complete enough to drive gate decisions.
items.guard: check:roadmap validates required backlog IDs and fields.
items.futureAction: Keep backlog item evidence and futureAction fields non-empty.

items.title: Phase gate structure gate
items.reason: Sales-order, delivery, finance, and production sequencing must be machine-checkable.
items.guard: check:phase-gate validates required/deferred gate items and blocks attempted sales-order implementation naming variants while beforeSalesOrder is incomplete.
items.futureAction: Mark beforeSalesOrder ready only after required items are completed.

items.title: Refactor debt gate
items.reason: Known customer debt must be visible before order-dependent modules are started.
items.guard: check:refactor-debt validates risk, decision, guard, and futureAction fields.
items.futureAction: Resolve or explicitly accept debt before dependent sales-order behavior is implemented.

items.title: Code index
items.reason: Useful for large follow-up work, but not required to establish the first sales-order handoff gate.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Add a code index once sales-order implementation scope is approved.

items.title: Dependency-closure context selection
items.reason: Dependency-closure selection is valuable but can wait until the compact current-context pack is stable.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Design dependency closure after module contracts stabilize.

items.title: Feature coverage fracture check
items.reason: Deep coverage checks require more complete feature contracts than this governance bootstrap has.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Add after the sales-order contract set exists.

items.title: Module dependency matrix
items.reason: Visualization is helpful but not necessary for the first gate wiring.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Generate after sales-order, delivery, and finance contracts are drafted.

items.title: Sales-order snapshot contract
items.reason: Sales order must preserve customer/contact/address state even if customer master data changes later.
items.guard: Sales-order implementation is blocked until snapshot fields and invariants are documented.
items.futureAction: Draft snapshot contract in the sales-order pre-review batch.

items.title: Sales-order state-machine contract
items.reason: Order state transitions must be stable before delivery, finance, and production depend on them.
items.guard: Sales-order implementation is blocked until allowed states and transitions are documented.
items.futureAction: Draft state-machine contract in the sales-order pre-review batch.

items.title: Fund boundary contract
items.reason: Customer deposit, order deposit, receipt, deduction, refund, and adjustment responsibilities must not blur.
items.guard: Sales-order implementation is blocked until fund boundaries are documented.
items.futureAction: Draft fund-boundary contract before order fund behavior.

items.title: Database migration, seed, and invariant plan
items.reason: Database changes are explicitly out of scope for this governance batch.
items.guard: No sales-order table or seed may be added in this change.
items.evidence: No DB business table structure changed.
items.futureAction: Prepare migration and invariant plan during sales-order implementation planning.

items.title: API integration test framework
items.reason: Integration tests require approved API contracts and runtime setup.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Add after sales-order API contracts are approved.

items.title: UI smoke test framework
items.reason: UI smoke tests require approved screens and runtime flow.
items.guard: Deferred item must remain documented with a reason.
items.futureAction: Add after sales-order UI screens are designed.

items.title: GitHub Actions
items.reason: CI is useful but explicitly out of this local governance batch.
items.guard: Do not create fake CI that only echoes success.
items.futureAction: Add real CI after local gates are stable and approved.
